evals.prompt: Set up a new FastAPI project from scratch for a task management app. I want the proper folder structure, dependencies, and a health-check endpoint.
evals.expected_output: Agent asks about stack (new project detected). Creates src/ layout with main.py, config.py, database.py, models/, schemas/, repositories/, services/, api/v1/. Writes pyproject.toml with uv deps. Implements GET /health -> 200 OK. No business logic beyond scaffold.

evals.prompt: I need a UserRepository with get_by_id, get_by_email, create, and update methods using async SQLAlchemy.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates src/repositories/user_repo.py using AsyncSession + select() ORM queries. All methods are async def, return User ORM instances or None. Uses Depends(get_db) pattern reference. No raw SQL strings.

evals.prompt: I need a background job that sends a weekly digest email to all users every Monday at 9am UTC.
evals.expected_output: Agent implements a Celery beat task using the existing Redis broker. Creates tasks/digest.py with @shared_task decorator, uses structlog for logging, includes error handling. Updates celeryconfig.py with the CELERYBEAT_SCHEDULE entry.
